name: adia-ui-factory
description: Author and verify apps built on the adia-ui (@adia-ai) light-DOM web-component framework — scaffold the app + host, compose screens and author components from the catalog, wire state/routing/data/LLM, and verify in the browser — across both SPA and SSR-framework rendering modes. Wires the a2ui MCP for catalog/pattern retrieval, UI generation, and validation.
